testcase.name: test_calculate_score_returns_valid_range

testcase.name: test_consultation_saves_and_retrieves

failure.message: AssertionError: Submitted consultation not found in admin view assert False

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_deep_verification.py:535: in test_consultation_saves_and_retrieves assert found, f"Submitted consultation not found in admin view" E AssertionError: Submitted consultation not found in admin view E assert False
